commit.message:
Fix orchestrator: always run host discovery on shell access, including DCs

The orchestrator previously routed DCs exclusively to ad-discovery,
skipping host-level enumeration entirely. This missed additional NICs
(critical for pivoting), Hyper-V infrastructure, scheduled tasks with
stored creds, and local privilege escalation vectors.

Now: host discovery (windows-discovery/linux-discovery) runs on ALL
hosts when shell access is gained. On DCs, ad-discovery runs additionally
after host discovery completes. Sequential, not either/or.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix remaining PostgREST 1000 row limits on Market page queries

Add .limit(10000) to 5 Supabase queries that were missing it:
- /api/market/trends (job listing query)
- /api/market/trends/skills (skill analysis query)
- lib/career-skills.ts (career path job query)
- lib/market-trends.ts (recent + previous period queries)
- lib/skill-details.ts (skill detail job query)

Without explicit .limit(), PostgREST defaults to 1000 rows,
causing totalJobs and other counts to be capped at 1000.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: set selectedAsset immediately to prevent dialog re-renders

When selecting an asset in the transaction dialog, the selectedAsset
state was only set after the async POST /api/assets call completed.
This created a window where other state changes (like userAssets
loading) could trigger the search effect and update yfSearchResults,
causing React to re-render the dialog and detach the Save button.

The fix sets selectedAsset immediately (optimistically) before the
async call, so the search effect returns early and doesn't cause
re-renders during form interaction.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix Indeed search + add Outreach Options to every listing card

Search fixes (surgical):
- Problem 1: Remove city validation — city is now optional, search works without it
- Problem 2: Add full console debug logging after every API call (status, content blocks, raw text, JSON parse result)
- Problem 3: Simple search queries ("role" remote job hiring 2025 OR 2026), no site: operators
- Batch roles in groups of 3 per API call to avoid overwhelming the model

Outreach Options (expandable section on every listing card):
- Option 1 Apply Direct (green): open listing + generate pitch to paste into Easily Apply
- Option 2 Find Contact (blue): web search for owner/hiring manager name+email+phone, then draft personalized email to that person; verifies correct company by industry+location
- Option 3 LinkedIn (purple): Google search link for hiring manager profile + generate connection note (300 char limit shown) + follow-up DM
- All generated content cached per listing so it persists when collapsing/expanding
- Tags: Fastest / Highest Response Rate / Most Personal

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: ThreadPoolExecutor 제거로 무한 스피너 데드락 해결

백그라운드 스레드에서 @st.cache_data + st.error() 호출 시
Streamlit 컨텍스트 접근 대기 → 메인 스레드 deadlock 발생.
외부 ThreadPoolExecutor를 제거하고 순차 로드로 변경.
(내부 청크 병렬 페칭은 load_supabase_data 안에 유지)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix toast auto-dismiss: use hx-on::load instead of inline script

HTMX evals swapped script content without setting document.currentScript,
so the inline script approach silently failed. Use hx-on::load which fires
reliably when an element is added to the DOM via HTMX swap (including OOB).

fix: Runway API request body — remove invalid watermark param, fix 1:1 ratio

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: health 500 error + powerState badge not showing

1. health routes: convert .then().catch() chains to async/await —
   ensures Express 4 handles errors correctly and always returns 200
   with mock fallback data instead of letting errors bubble to the
   default 500 handler

2. collectResourcePowerState: move getArmFetcher() call inside try/catch
   and switch to getArmFetcherAuto (SP credential fallback) — previously
   an OBO token exchange failure threw outside the catch block, causing
   collectBatchPowerStates to silently reject and leaving all nodes with
   powerState = undefined (no badge shown)

3. liveAggregator: remove hasBearerToken guard on powerState collection —
   now collects powerState via SP fallback even when user has no OBO token

commit.message:
fix: Add 9-digit fallback for PBX lead phone matching

Spanish mobile numbers are 9 digits nationally. The last-10-digit
fallback was including a digit from the country code (34), causing
lead detection to fail for numbers stored without the country prefix.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix investment rounds not appearing in report from uploaded docs

Root causes:
1. Financial agent treated investment rounds as optional web-search data.
   Now explicitly instructs: extract EVERY round from uploaded docs FIRST,
   output pre-money, post-money, investors for EACH round individually.
2. rich_financial_analysis() trimmed investment_rounds to max 5 items /
   600 chars via _deep_trim. Now uses dedicated higher limits (15 items,
   800 chars) so no rounds are lost.
3. Report writer Section 5.3 said "if data exists" (too weak). Now
   MANDATORY with explicit table columns including Pre-Money/Post-Money.

commit.message:
Production-hardening: packaging, type hints, error handling, tests, CI, Thessaloniki network

Packaging
- Replace requirements.txt with PEP 621 pyproject.toml (pinned deps with
  upper bounds, [dev] extras for pytest/mypy/ruff, py-modules for flat layout)
- Add py.typed marker (PEP 561 compliance)

Type hints & error handling
- Add from __future__ import annotations and module-level loggers to all four
  core modules (runner, risk_model, accident_manager, metrics)
- Replace every bare except: pass with logger.warning/debug calls that include
  vehicle ID / accident ID / step context
- Fix datetime.utcnow() deprecation → datetime.now(timezone.utc)

Tests (55 unit tests, no SUMO required)
- tests/conftest.py: session-scoped TraCI mock injected into sys.modules
- tests/test_risk_model.py: 17 tests (Nilsson model, variance, density, trigger)
- tests/test_accident_manager.py: 14 tests (lifecycle, severity distribution)
- tests/test_metrics.py: 15 tests (AI computation, export, snapshots)
- tests/test_config_validation.py: 9 tests (all validation failure paths)

CI/CD
- .github/workflows/ci.yml: lint (ruff + mypy) + pytest matrix on
  Python 3.10 / 3.11 / 3.12; unit tests run without SUMO in CI

Network generation
- generate_thessaloniki.py: downloads Thessaloniki OSM via Overpass API,
  converts with netconvert, generates 7 168 routes, writes .sumocfg, and
  optionally patches config.yaml (--update-config / --gui flags)
- config.yaml updated to point at Thessaloniki network (smoke-tested: 600
  steps, 3 accidents, 520 vehicles — confirmed working)
- base_probability calibrated for Thessaloniki (~500 vehicles): 5.0e-05

README
- Add CI / Python 3.10+ / MIT badges
- New "Bundled Networks" section documenting all three generators with
  quick-start commands for Thessaloniki, Sioux Falls, and Riverside District
- New calibration table: base_probability vs simultaneous vehicle count
- Development section: note 55-test suite and TraCI mock strategy
- Installation: pip install . / pip install -e ".[dev]" workflow

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

signet: remove Vault client, migrate to SQLCipher architecture

Delete vault_client.c/h and remove all HashiCorp Vault dependencies from
Signet. This is the first step in migrating from Vault-backed key custody
to SQLCipher + mlock'd hot key cache per the new design spec.

Changes:
- Delete vault_client.c (575 lines) and vault_client.h
- Rewrite key_store.h/c as stub interface (no Vault dependency)
- Remove all Vault config fields from signet_config.h/c
- Replace health_server vault_reachable with db_open, agents_active,
  cache_entries, relay_count fields matching design spec
- Remove Vault policy store backend from policy_store.h/c
- Remove Vault init/teardown from signetd_main.c
- Remove libcurl dependency from meson.build, CMakeLists.txt, meson.options
- Update test_signet_smoke.c to use new interfaces
- Rewrite README.md for SQLCipher + hot cache architecture
- Rewrite INTEGRATION.md for Nostr-native management protocol
- Update signet.toml.example to match design spec format

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: use non-colliding SQL aliases for formatted timestamps

ClickHouse resolves SELECT aliases in WHERE clauses, so aliasing
formatDateTime output as server_timestamp shadowed the raw column
and broke the BETWEEN comparison. Rename to client_ts/server_ts
with serde(rename) to preserve the JSON field names.

feat: add query/filter/pagination on collection endpoints (#11)

* feat: add query/filter/pagination on collection endpoints

GET /api/{model} now returns a wrapper response with pagination metadata:
{"data": [...], "total": N, "skip": 0, "take": null, "has_more": false}

Query parameters:
- skip=N / take=N for pagination
- sort=field (asc) / sort=-field (desc)
- field=value (eq), field=>value (gt), field=<value (lt),
  field=~value (contains), field=!value (ne),
  field=>=value (gte), field=<=value (lte)

This is a breaking change for v0.2.0: list responses are now wrapped
objects instead of bare arrays.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: address review comments on query/filter/pagination

- Fix numeric equality: parse target as f64 for proper comparison
- Return false for array/object equality (not meaningfully compared via query)
- Add DEFAULT_MAX_TAKE (1000) to prevent unbounded collection responses
- Always enforce take limit even when not specified by client

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: release read lock before expensive JSON transforms

Drop storage read guard before filtering/sorting to prevent
write starvation under load. Also apply cargo fmt.

- Derive id path parameter type from model's primary key
- Add vec_items_schema() for proper array item typing
- Sort permissions deterministically before selecting security scheme
- Use CARGO_PKG_VERSION for API version instead of hardcoded string

commit.message:
fix: PDF生成OOMを根本解決 — HTMLプレビュー+オンデマンド生成に刷新 (#168, #169) (#172)

## Problem
PR #161 で修正したPDF生成OOMが再発。画面遷移時に即座にPDFを
生成する設計が根本原因。256MB Heap上限に対し、WebViewが~95MB
のアロケーションを要求してOOM（5回発生）。

## Solution

### アーキテクチャ変更（根本策）
- PDFプレビュー画面を WebView HTMLプレビューに変更
- react-native-pdf → react-native-webview に置き換え
- プレビューは小さいサムネイル(200px)+フォント埋め込みスキップで軽量化
- PDF生成は「PDFを出力」ボタン押下時のみ実行（オンデマンド）
- 生成後は即座にエクスポート→一時ファイル削除

### 安全策
- android:largeHeap=true を Expo config plugin で設定（Heap 256→512MB）
- 画像サイズ縮小: Standard 800→600px, Large 1000→800px
- Large layout の quality も 0.7→0.65 に統一

### その他
- expo-image の resizeMode="cover" → contentFit="cover" に移行 (#169)

## Files Changed
- app/reports/[id]/pdf.tsx — WebView HTML preview + on-demand export
- src/features/pdf/pdfTemplate.ts — preview mode, image size reduction
- plugins/withLargeHeap.js — Expo config plugin for largeHeap
- app.config.ts — register withLargeHeap plugin
- src/features/reports/ReportEditorScreen.tsx — contentFit migration
- __tests__/pdfImageConfig.test.ts — updated assertions
- package.json + pnpm-lock.yaml — add react-native-webview

Co-authored-by: doooooraku <doooooraku@gmail.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
